title: Rūpasamuddesavaṇṇanā
original: 8. Hadayameva manodhātumanoviññāṇadhātūnaṃ nissayattā vatthu cāti hadayavatthu. Tathā hi taṃ dhātudvayanissayabhāvalakkhaṇaṃ, tañca hadayakosabbhantare aḍḍhapasatamattaṃ lohitaṃ nissāya pavattati. Rūpakaṇḍe avuttassapi panetassa āgamato, yuttito ca atthibhāvo daṭṭhabbo. Tattha, taṃ rūpaṃ nissāya manodhātu ca manoviññāṇadhātu ca vattanti ‘‘yaṃ rūpaṃ manodhātuyā ca manoviññāṇadhātuyā ca taṃsampayuttakānañca dhammānaṃ nissayapaccayena paccayo’’ti (paṭṭhā. 1.1.8) evamāgataṃ paṭṭhānavacanaṃ āgamo. Yutti panevaṃ daṭṭhabbā –
